title: telis suavissima
intro: Telis suavissima, commonly known as Sweet Elder, is a plant species that has been used in traditional medicine for its numerous health benefits. It is used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and fever, due to its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties. The bioactive constituents of Sweet Elder include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its therapeutic actions, such as pain relief, antimicrobial activity, and antioxidant properties. The therapeutic actions of Telis suavissima include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic effects, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine.
intro_study: According to "Hinyokika kiyo. Acta urologica Japonica", telis suavissima benefits include a statistically significant improvement in sperm density, motility, and the sperm motile efficiency index (SMEI) in patients with male infertility.
